name: Data Feed Agent
description: Package premium data as a receipt-gated feed for agents, apps, and bots.
whatItDoes: Serves paid crypto, market, sports, weather, social, or on-chain data feeds.
Uses receipts and webhooks to control feed access.
Supports visible builder fees for feed operators.
receiptProofBehavior: Webhook events can notify the feed backend after payment finalization.
Receipt ID is included in the feed response audit trail.
suggestedPrompt: Create a paid data feed using DNA x402. Require a receipt before returning premium feed rows, show the builder fee and DNA fee in the fee waterfall, verify webhooks, and keep the example in mock mode by default.
